violations.text: The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The 1 door reach-in was observed not operational and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Walk-in cooler was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Deli display cooler was observed at 46 DF. The 1 door reach-in was observed at 75 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC turned the walk-in cooler dial down, walk-in cooler got down to 40DF. All food in units were evaluated and either voluntarily disposed of or moved to the walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in the deli display case or 1 door reach-in until they are able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, service will be called today. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Salami was observed held past the date of disposition. Salami was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area and retail area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
